reviews.page_subtitle: Real customer feedback from a service you can trust

tourist_reviews.name: Ms. Zhang
tourist_reviews.comment: The driver was very professional and arrived at our hotel on time. He introduced attractions along the way and helped us take many beautiful photos. The car was clean and comfortable. Highly recommended!

tourist_reviews.name: John Smith
tourist_reviews.comment: Excellent service! The driver was waiting for us at the airport with a sign. Very professional and the car was spotless. Highly recommend for airport transfers.

tourist_reviews.name: Mr. Li
tourist_reviews.comment: It was our first time in Hokkaido, and choosing a charter was a great decision. The driver was warm and friendly, took us to many popular photo spots, and recommended great local food. Pricing was transparent with no hidden fees.

tourist_reviews.name: Ms. Wang
tourist_reviews.comment: Traveling with elderly family members and children was so much easier with a charter. The driver was patient, the itinerary was well arranged, and child seats plus drinking water were prepared in the car. Very thoughtful service.

tourist_reviews.name: Sarah Johnson
tourist_reviews.comment: Amazing experience! Our driver spoke good English and was very knowledgeable about the area. The hot spring tour was perfectly organized. Will definitely use this service again.

tourist_reviews.name: Mr. Chen
tourist_reviews.comment: We did a 5-day, 4-night in-depth Hokkaido trip with full charter service. The driver was highly professional and knew the routes very well. He helped optimize the itinerary and recommended many excellent local restaurants. Very satisfied!

corporate_reviews.comment: They provided three vehicles for our company’s annual team-building event. Drivers were punctual and professional, vehicles were clean and comfortable, and the itinerary was handled very smoothly. Our staff were very satisfied.

They handled airport transfers and conference transportation for an international event. Service was highly professional, on-time performance was 100%, and communication with multilingual drivers was smooth.
As our long-term partner in Hokkaido, they consistently provide stable and reliable charter service. Their fleet is large, vehicle options are diverse, and service quality remains consistently high.

faqs.q: How do I book an airport transfer?
faqs.a: You can book in advance through our website, phone, WeChat, or LINE. We recommend booking at least 24 hours ahead.

faqs.q: What if my flight is delayed?
faqs.a: We monitor flight status in real time and wait free of charge for delayed flights, so there is no additional fee.

faqs.q: Can I change my destination at the last minute?
faqs.a: Yes, but please inform the driver in advance and the fare will be recalculated accordingly.

faqs.q: What if I have too much luggage?
faqs.a: If you have a large amount of luggage, please mention it when booking so we can arrange the most suitable vehicle.

faq.page_subtitle: Quickly find answers to your questions
faq.q_booking_how: How do I book a charter service?
faq.a_booking_how: You can contact us by phone, email, LINE, WhatsApp, or the website form. Please provide your travel date, number of passengers, and itinerary needs, and we will reply with a quotation within 24 hours.
faq.q_booking_include: What is included in the price?
faq.a_booking_include: The base fee includes vehicle usage, driver service, vehicle insurance, and basic fuel costs. It does not include tolls, parking, attraction tickets, meals, or driver accommodation for multi-day trips.
faq.a_booking_payment: We accept cash, credit card, bank transfer, Alipay, and WeChat Pay. A 30% deposit is usually required, and the balance is paid after the service is completed.
faq.a_booking_invoice: Yes. We can provide an official invoice. Please let us know the invoice title and tax number when booking.
faq.a_cancel_policy: Free cancellation up to 7 days in advance; 30% charge for 7-3 days; 50% charge within 3 days; 100% charge for same-day cancellation or no-show.
faq.q_cancel_change: Can I change the itinerary at the last minute?
faq.a_cancel_change: Yes. As long as it does not exceed the booked time, you can discuss adjustments directly with the driver. For major changes, please contact us in advance.
faq.q_cancel_delay: What if my flight is delayed?
faq.a_cancel_delay: Airport transfer service includes 2 hours of free waiting time. Beyond that, a waiting fee of ¥3,000 per hour applies. Please inform us promptly of any flight changes.
faq.q_lang_driver: Do your drivers speak Chinese or English?
faq.a_lang_driver: We have drivers who speak Chinese and English, subject to advance booking. A foreign-language driver requires an additional ¥5,000 per day.
faq.q_lang_no: What if we do not speak the same language?
faq.a_lang_no: We provide translation devices and common phrase cards. Our customer service team can also help by phone if needed.
faq.a_child_seat: Child seats are provided free of charge. Please let us know the child’s age and weight when booking so we can prepare the appropriate seat.
faq.a_ski: Yes. Please tell us the quantity and size of your equipment in advance so we can arrange a suitable vehicle.
faq.q_wheelchair: Can a wheelchair fit in the vehicle?
faq.a_wheelchair: Some vehicles can accommodate a folding wheelchair. If you need an accessible vehicle, please contact us in advance.
faq.a_luggage_limit: Luggage capacity varies by vehicle type. In general: sedan 2-3 pieces, MPV 4-6 pieces, van 8-10 pieces. Please tell us in advance if you have oversized luggage.
faq.q_eat: Can we eat in the vehicle?
faq.a_eat: Water and simple snacks are allowed. Please avoid strongly scented food and help keep the vehicle clean.
faq.contact_us: Contact our customer service team anytime

about.page_subtitle: Professional, Safe, and Thoughtful Hokkaido Charter Service
about.intro_p1: We are a professional company specializing in premium charter services across Hokkaido, founded in 2015. Over the years, we have provided safe, comfortable, and attentive transportation services to travelers from around the world and earned consistently positive feedback.
about.intro_p2: Our team consists of experienced drivers and professional customer service staff who know every road and attraction in Hokkaido. Whether you need airport transfers, city sightseeing, or a multi-day custom itinerary, we are ready to deliver excellent service.
about.mission_safe_desc: Licensed, fully insured, and strictly maintained vehicles for worry-free travel
about.mission_secure_desc: Professional drivers, safe driving, and real-time monitoring — your safety comes first
about.mission_comfort_desc: Comfortable vehicles, thoughtful service, and flexible itineraries for a better trip
